scripts.generate: pnpm exec node --input-type=module -e "import { parse } from '../../packages/psl/dist/index.js'; import { emitSchemaAndTypes } from '../../packages/schema-emitter/dist/index.js'; import fs from 'fs'; const pslContent = fs.readFileSync('schema.psl', 'utf-8'); const ast = parse(pslContent); const { schema, types } = emitSchemaAndTypes(ast); fs.mkdirSync('.prisma', { recursive: true }); fs.writeFileSync('.prisma/schema.json', schema); fs.writeFileSync('.prisma/schema.d.ts', types); console.log('✅ Generated schema files');"
